propositions: README's session-log command is invalid because it is missing the append subcommand.
README quickstart is not a true end-to-end single-ticket golden path.
README and docs/config.md state the wrong dependency count and mcp version floor (truth: 3 base deps, mcp>=1.9).
docs/output-schemas.md points at a moved source path and describes a removed bash shell-out; stale bash-engine language remains in CI comments and leaf.py.
docs/README.md index is incomplete and mixes living references with historical evidence.
New CI gates must extract literal README quickstart commands to fail the build on command text rot, and enforce docs-index completeness and link resolution.
